steps.title: Substitute x = 7 into the function
steps.content: We have $f(x) = 2x + b$. Using the condition $f(7) = 6$, substitute $x = 7$: $$f(7) = 2(7) + b = 14 + b$$

steps.title: Solve the equation for b
steps.content: Since $f(7) = 6$, we have: $$14 + b = 6$$ Subtract 14 from both sides: $$b = 6 - 14 = -8$$
